name: Greater Cleveland Food Bank
notes: Call or use the website to find nearby pantry partners.

name: United Way 2-1-1
notes: A strong catch-all for housing, food, transportation, utilities, and benefits navigation.

name: GCRTA Paratransit
notes: Useful for patients who qualify for door-to-door transit assistance.

name: Eldercare Locator
notes: National Administration for Community Living service to connect older adults and caregivers with local aging resources.

name: Medicare
address: Available by phone, live chat, or online
notes: 24/7 Medicare help line for coverage, plans, providers, and Medicare questions. TTY: 1-877-486-2048.

name: State Health Insurance Assistance Program Locator
notes: Find free local Medicare counseling for plan choices, costs, Extra Help, complaints, and appeals.

name: Social Security Administration
address: Available by phone, online, or local office
notes: Benefits, disability, SSI, Social Security cards, and Medicare enrollment support. TTY: 1-800-325-0778.

name: 988 Suicide & Crisis Lifeline
address: Available by call, text, chat, or online
notes: Free, confidential 24/7 crisis support for mental health, emotional distress, alcohol or drug concerns, or someone who needs to talk.

name: USAGov Benefit Finder
notes: Federal benefit finder for disability, food, health, housing, utilities, jobs, retirement, and other assistance categories.

name: Ohio Benefits
notes: Ohio portal for applying for and managing benefits such as Medicaid, food assistance, cash assistance, and child care assistance.

name: Ohio Department of Aging
notes: Statewide aging-services information and links to Area Agencies on Aging for older adults, caregivers, and adults with disabilities.

name: Ohio Tobacco Quit Line
notes: Free tobacco cessation coaching and support; useful for stroke risk reduction outreach.
